ground_truth.title: 7 tips to help you stick with a workout routine | Kaiser Permanente
ground_truth.main_content: Learn ways to help maintain a workout routine, including starting slowly, finding a exercise buddy, rewarding yourself, and incorporating workouts into your daily schedule. This health article provides practical advice for establishing and maintaining a consistent fitness regimen.
with: Learn ways to help maintain a workout routine, including starting slowly, finding a exercise buddy, rewarding yourself, and incorporating workouts into your daily schedule.
7 tips to help you stick with a workout routine
This health article provides practical advice for establishing and maintaining a consistent fitness regimen.
Starting slowly can help prevent burnout and injury when beginning a new exercise routine.
Finding an exercise buddy can provide accountability and motivation to stick with fitness goals.

items.alt: Two people working out together outside
